title: Times Software
description: ***.com.sg zoominfo.com/c/times-software-pte-ltd/432254282 Times Software Pte Ltd is a trusted Singaporean IT company founded in 1998, specializing in comprehensive Human Resource and Payroll management solutions.They provide businesses with robust software that seamlessly automates timesheets, leave management, and claims while ensuring strict compliance with local CPF, IRAS, and MOM regulations.With a strong focus on boosting corporate productivity, they help organizations simplify complex HR workflows and significantly reduce manual administrative work
